response.overview: Melissa, a young artist, longs for the perfect partner. She uses paint as an outlet to express her loneliness and defeat until it one day turns to lust... Jake matches with Melissa on a dating app and she doesn’t look back. Her days of crying into her canvases are long gone as she channels her artistic skills into the love she feels for her new man. Melissa’s innocent and hopeful intentions can only go so far as her obsessive nature takes over.
response.title: The Perfect Picture
